title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Moderate thunderstorms are expected for N Germany today.

ENHD
N Germany

Moderate thunderstorms are expected for this region.
Multiple thunderstorms (some could potentially become supercellular) will initiate in late afternoon. Models show they could merge into a stronger MCS.
The main threats these storms will bring are:
- Big Hail - up to 3cm possible
- Heavy Rain - in some places up to 51mm in 3hr
- Flash flooding - due to heavy rain
- Strong wind gusts - up to 90+km/h

SLGT #1
N Germany

Very similar hazards to ENHD, but lower probability and intensity.

SLGT #2
S Germany, W Austria

Strong storm system could pass in the early morning of the 14th.
The threats would be:
- Strong wind gusts
- Hail
- Heavy Rain
